With over 70,000 customers worldwide, including notable organizations like Sony, NBC, and the Government of Canada, Exclaimer is recognized as a leader in its field. The company is an accredited Microsoft Gold Partner and Google Workspace Partner, and it has achieved ISO 27001 certification for its cloud-based services.

FitFlop is a footwear company founded in 2007 by Marcia Kilgore, focusing on combining fashion with biomechanics. The brand is recognized for its innovative designs that enhance natural movement, improve posture, and provide comfort and support. FitFlop collaborates with scientists and biomechanists to develop its products, ensuring they are both stylish and beneficial for foot health.

The product range includes sandals, flip-flops, casual shoes, sneakers, flats, boots, and slip-ons. The Walkstar™ sandal, featuring the patented Microwobbleboard™ midsole, was the company's first iconic product, designed to reduce strain and improve body alignment. FitFlop's in-house team, led by Dr. Kim Lilley, focuses on scientifically tested materials and designs that optimize energy use and comfort.

FitFlop appeals to a global community of customers who prioritize health-conscious footwear choices. The brand emphasizes empowering women through shoes that promote strength and confidence, making it a popular choice for those seeking both style and support in their footwear.

Foster Denovo is a UK-based financial advisory firm established in 2005. The company specializes in providing tailored financial advice, services, and investment solutions to individuals, families, charities, and businesses. With over 65 offices across the UK, Foster Denovo has expanded its reach through strategic acquisitions, enhancing its employee benefits division and managing around 1,500 corporate relationships, primarily with mid-sized SMEs.

The firm offers a wide range of services, including specialist financial advice, employee benefits advisory through its Secondsight division, wealth management, and support for charities in financial planning. Foster Denovo is regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority and has received Platinum accreditation from Investors in People, highlighting its commitment to employee development. With a focus on building trusted relationships and delivering exceptional client experiences, the firm has earned over 30 industry awards, reflecting its dedication to excellence in the financial services sector.

Galldris Group is a UK-based civil engineering and construction company with an estimated annual revenue of around $172.9 million and a workforce of approximately 477 employees. The company specializes in civil engineering services, including groundworks, drainage, roadworks, and tunneling. Over the years, it has grown from a contractor focused on groundworks to one of the leading civil engineering contractors in the UK.

The group operates through subsidiaries like ODG Plant Hire Limited and 3G Tunnelling Services Limited, serving various sectors such as housing, rail, water, education, retail, commercial, health, leisure, and industrial projects. Galldris Group is known for its commitment to quality workmanship and strong health and safety records, with 98% of sites free from issues over four years. The company has also transitioned to an Employee Ownership Trust to foster shared ownership and align with its values of collaboration and innovation.

Highgate School, officially known as Sir Roger Cholmeley's School at Highgate, is a prestigious co-educational private day school located in Highgate, London. Founded in 1565, it has a rich history that began as a free grammar school for boys. Over the years, the school has evolved into a fee-charging institution, becoming fully co-educational in 2004 and now serving both boys and girls.

The school offers a broad academic curriculum that prepares students for higher education and future careers, emphasizing humanities, sciences, arts, and sports. Highgate School also provides extensive extracurricular activities to support personal development. With modern facilities, including classrooms, science laboratories, and sports fields, the school ensures a well-rounded education. It maintains a strong tradition of religious and moral education, reflecting its historical roots in the Church of England. Highgate School attracts families seeking a high-quality education for their children, combining tradition with modern educational practices.

Huntress is a UK-based recruitment company with over 20 years of experience, specializing in sourcing skilled professionals in office support, accounting and finance, IT, and analytics sectors. The company operates through 13 offices across the UK, including major cities like London, Leeds, and Brighton, and fills over 13,000 roles annually for more than 1,500 employers.

Huntress focuses on building long-term relationships with both candidates and clients. They invest in understanding the skills and ambitions of job seekers, as well as the cultures and needs of hiring organizations. The company also emphasizes employee development through training and onboarding programs, recognizing contributions with quarterly awards. With a commitment to quality matching and a strong internal culture, Huntress is dedicated to supporting the recruitment needs of various industries across the UK.

Investigo is a recruitment and staffing company founded in 2003 and headquartered in London, UK, with additional offices in several cities including New York and San Diego. The company specializes in recruitment across various sectors such as Accountancy and Finance, Risk, Compliance, Business Change, Human Resources, Technology, and Private Equity.

With a team of over 300 employees, Investigo focuses on building long-term relationships with clients and candidates. They offer tailored recruitment solutions, including temporary and permanent placements, management consultancy related to talent acquisition, and career guidance for candidates at all levels. Investigo aims to connect the right talent with the right opportunities, emphasizing a partnership approach that prioritizes understanding the needs of both clients and candidates. 

The company serves a diverse range of clients in professional services and financial sectors, reflecting its expertise in specialized recruitment. Investigo is committed to making a meaningful difference in the recruitment process by fostering ongoing dialogue and support beyond initial placements.

JSM Group Services Ltd. is a prominent UK-based provider of integrated utility infrastructure solutions, focusing on power, telecommunications, gas, and multi-utility sectors. Established in 1998 and headquartered in Potters Bar, Hertfordshire, the company employs approximately 250-500 people and generates an annual turnover exceeding £54 million.

The company offers a wide array of services, including design, planning, construction, project management, infrastructure network commissioning, and maintenance. Their expertise covers four main areas: power solutions delivered by experienced electrical engineers, complex fibre network projects in telecommunications, new installations and diversion works in gas, and integrated services across utilities in the multi-utility sector. JSM Group is committed to innovation and sustainability, aiming to enhance connectivity in energy and communications while ensuring excellent client outcomes.

Additionally, JSM Group operates a Training Centre in Barking, Essex, providing accredited courses to support workforce development and uphold industry standards. Their client base extends across the UK, Europe, and beyond, showcasing their capability to manage large-scale utility infrastructure projects.

Kocho is a UK-based technology consultancy and IT services company with over 20 years of experience. Headquartered in London, it specializes in Microsoft cloud technology, identity management, mobility, connectivity, and cybersecurity solutions. With a workforce of approximately 220-500 employees, Kocho aims to help businesses achieve secure digital transformation and sustainable growth through tailored technology solutions and expert consultancy.

The company offers a wide range of services, including identity management, mobility and connectivity solutions, cybersecurity services, managed IT support, and strategic technology consultancy. Kocho is recognized for its expertise, having won the Microsoft Partner of the Year award eight times and holding key industry accreditations such as ISO9001 and ISO27001. It promotes a collaborative culture, positioning itself as a trusted partner for clients throughout their transformation journeys.

Lavazza Professional UK is a division of the renowned Lavazza Group, an Italian coffee company with over 130 years of expertise in coffee blending. Established in 2008, the company is based in Basingstoke, Hampshire, and specializes in coffee and vending solutions for workplace environments.

The company offers a wide range of products and services, including compact coffee machines and high-performance vending systems like KLIX® and FLAVIA®. Lavazza Professional UK provides premium coffee, recognized as the UK's top retail roast, along with popular brands such as Twinings tea and Cadbury’s chocolate. They also utilize a solutions finder tool to recommend tailored coffee and vending machines based on specific business needs.

With a strong commitment to sustainability, Lavazza Professional UK aligns with the Lavazza Group’s “Roadmap to Zero” initiative, aiming to neutralize its carbon footprint by 2030. The company focuses on enhancing the workplace experience for business customers, ensuring reliable service and high-quality beverage options.

LoopMe is a technology company based in the UK, founded in 2012, that focuses on AI-powered brand advertising and digital media optimization. The company helps brand marketers enhance their advertising effectiveness across various digital channels, including mobile in-app video, gaming, connected TV, digital audio, and digital out-of-home. Its platform utilizes artificial intelligence and data science to optimize media campaigns in real-time, resulting in improved purchase intent, brand consideration, foot traffic, and sales growth.

With a global presence, LoopMe has offices in major cities such as New York, San Francisco, Singapore, Tokyo, Sydney, and Hong Kong. The company employs over 200 people and has shown strong growth, reporting estimated gross revenues near $100 million in 2021. LoopMe's offerings include an AI-driven advertising platform, an Audience and Measurement Platform (AMP), and cross-channel media optimization, which collectively serve a diverse range of clients, including well-known global brands and advertising agencies. The company is committed to innovation and customer satisfaction, aiming to enhance consumer experiences through its advanced technology.

MNI (Market News International) is a prominent financial news and intelligence provider, focusing on real-time information and analysis for the foreign exchange, fixed income, and energy markets. Established in 1983 and headquartered in London, MNI has a global presence with bureaus in Europe, Asia, and the United States. The company employs around 96 professionals, including experienced journalists and former traders, and is recognized by major institutions such as the White House and central banks of G-7 nations.

MNI offers a variety of news and intelligence products, including the MNI Main Wire for real-time intelligence, MNI Bullet Points for quick market commentary, and MNI Connect for direct engagement with policymakers. Their services also include MNI Edge, which connects clients to experts via instant messaging, and real-time market analysis covering technical insights and macroeconomic policies. MNI serves financial institutions, traders, and policymakers, providing them with critical insights to support informed decision-making in global capital markets.

Narvar is a post-purchase experience platform that helps brands, retailers, and merchants enhance customer engagement and drive business growth. Founded by Amit Sharma, the company focuses on transforming post-purchase interactions into loyalty-building moments using its AI-powered predictive intelligence platform, IRIS™.

The platform offers a range of services, including AI-powered delivery date estimates, personalized tracking experiences, seamless shipping insurance, proactive communication tools, delivery claim management, and returns and exchanges management. These features aim to improve customer satisfaction and streamline operations, allowing retailers to meet evolving consumer expectations effectively. Narvar leverages extensive retail data and predictive AI to support intelligent operations and reduce costs.

Headquartered in San Mateo, California, with additional offices in London and India, Narvar is recognized for its innovation in logistics and retail technology. The company continues to evolve its offerings to support retailers in enhancing their e-commerce and post-purchase experiences.

Company Name: NAViGO Health and Social Care CIC
Description:
NAVIGO Health and Social Care CIC is a Community Interest Company located in Grimsby, North East Lincolnshire. It specializes in mental health and social care services, employing a multidisciplinary team that includes mental health practitioners, occupational therapists, social workers, and specialist nurses. The organization provides a range of services, including acute patient care, community mental health support, family therapy, and rehabilitation for various mental health conditions. NAVIGO aims to improve mental health outcomes and promote social inclusion while supporting service users in reaching their potential.

Navigo Smart Technologies is a technology company focused on indoor navigation and mapping solutions. They develop indoor wayfinding platforms that feature interactive 2D, 3D, and augmented reality maps for smartphones and digital kiosks. Their technology integrates with Bluetooth beacons, WiFi, and GPS to enhance indoor positioning and navigation, improving visitor experiences in complex venues. The company also offers a powerful SDK for developers, emphasizing easy integration and efficient resource use.

Nudge Education Limited is a UK-based education management company founded in 2016 and headquartered in Newcastle upon Tyne. The company is dedicated to supporting children and young people who face significant barriers to learning and are often disengaged from traditional education. Nudge Education specializes in delivering personalized educational interventions aimed at re-engaging students at risk of or already disconnected from schooling.

The company takes a holistic approach to education, offering comprehensive assessments of academic ability and emotional wellbeing. They develop tailored learning plans and provide interventions primarily through one-on-one or small group settings. Nudge Education collaborates with schools, local authorities, clinical commissioning groups, and families to ensure effective support and smooth transitions for students. Their services include specialized support for those with special educational needs, social, emotional, and mental health challenges, and those in care. Nudge Education has worked with over 200 schools across more than 40 local authority areas in the UK, demonstrating their extensive experience in the sector.

OMMAX is a digital strategy consultancy based in Munich, Germany, focused on digital transformation, transaction advisory, and strategy consulting. The company specializes in driving innovation and enhancing digital growth and profitability across Europe. With a strong track record, OMMAX has executed over 200 M&A deals valued at more than €15 billion and completed over 800 international value creation projects, primarily for private equity firms and mid-sized companies.

The core services offered by OMMAX include digital M&A transaction advisory, digital strategy consulting, and the end-to-end execution of digital initiatives. They also provide Salesforce multi-cloud solutions to help clients maximize their business success. OMMAX has a notable presence in the travel sector, working with clients such as Lufthansa Holidays and B&B Hotels. The company employs around 279 people and reported revenues of approximately $6.4 million, positioning itself as a key player in the European digital consultancy landscape.

Ooni is a Scotland-based company that specializes in high-temperature outdoor pizza ovens for residential use. Founded in 2012 by Kristian Tapaninaho and Darina Garland, Ooni created the world’s first portable wood-pellet fired pizza oven. This innovation allows users to make restaurant-quality pizza at home quickly and affordably, heating up to 932°F (500°C) in just 20 minutes.

Ooni offers a variety of outdoor pizza ovens that utilize wood, wood pellets, or gas as fuel sources. Their products are designed for portability and ease of use, catering to both casual home cooks and pizza enthusiasts. The company emphasizes customer support and community engagement, fostering a global network of pizza lovers. Ooni has experienced significant growth, particularly during the COVID-19 pandemic, and continues to expand its international presence while maintaining independence and a focus on innovation.

Aliases: Options Group Services UK Limited, Options Group Services UK
Description:
Options Group is a global executive search and strategic consulting firm focused on the financial services industry. Founded in 1992, the company started as a technology recruiting firm and has since expanded its services to include a wide range of financial professionals, particularly in derivatives and structured products. Headquartered in New York City, Options Group operates over 15 offices worldwide and employs more than 200 people.

The firm specializes in executive search and strategic consulting, helping clients identify and recruit top talent in areas such as technology, quantitative research, trading, and risk management. Options Group has successfully placed over 15,000 professionals in more than 1,000 companies across six continents. The company is committed to ethics and inclusion, with initiatives like OGDiverse promoting diversity within the organization. Additionally, Options Group supports community organizations focused on literacy and education, reflecting its dedication to social responsibility.

Aliases: Power On Connections Ltd, Power On Connections
Description:
Power On is a prominent independent multi-utility connections provider in the UK, focusing on the design, delivery, and operation of utility infrastructure across various sectors, including electricity, water, wastewater, fiber, heat, and gas. Founded in 2003 by former regional electricity company employees, Power On aims to enhance competition and choice in essential electricity services. The company is part of the BUUK Infrastructure Group, serving over two million homes.

Power On offers a comprehensive solution for utility connections, managing projects of all sizes, from small developments to large-scale schemes. The company is known for its efficient and cost-effective service, including electrical installations, water and wastewater infrastructure, fiber optic connections, and heat and gas installations. With multiple offices across the UK, Power On emphasizes exceptional customer service and workforce empowerment, fostering a loyal customer base and a motivated team.

Smartedge Solutions is a UK-based IT services and technology solutions company founded in 2005 and headquartered in London. With around 300 employees, the company generates approximately $45.6 million in revenue. It specializes in delivering tailored IT solutions and services that emphasize adaptability, flexibility, cost-effectiveness, and reliability.

The company positions itself as a trusted business partner, focusing on client-centric solutions. Smartedge Solutions offers a wide range of IT consultancy and technology services, including IT solutions design and implementation, managed IT services, and customized technology solutions aimed at improving operational effectiveness. The company prides itself on its ability to adapt to the fast-changing IT landscape, ensuring quality and close collaboration with clients. 

Smartedge Solutions serves a diverse client base across the UK and Europe, highlighting long-standing relationships that reflect its commitment to service quality and responsiveness.

SPT Labtech is a UK-based company that designs and manufactures automated liquid handling instruments and Cryogenic Electron Microscopy (Cryo-EM) sample preparation and storage systems. Founded in 1997 and headquartered in Melbourn, the company has expanded its reach across Europe, North America, and Asia. SPT Labtech aims to accelerate life science research by providing innovative automation solutions that enhance precision and reliability while reducing manual errors.

The company offers a range of products, including automated liquid handling instruments that improve laboratory workflows, Cryo-EM systems for structural biology research, and specialized consumables that ensure optimal performance. SPT Labtech also provides technical support and collaborates with customers to develop tailored solutions for specific research challenges. Their instruments are utilized by pharmaceutical companies, biotechnology firms, and academic institutions, contributing to significant research efforts, including the sequencing of the COVID-19 virus.

With a focus on collaboration and innovation, SPT Labtech fosters a supportive work environment for its employees and continues to grow its product portfolio, positioning itself as a leader in the low-throughput liquid handling market and the expanding Cryo-EM segment.

Aliases: Taptap Send UK Ltd., Taptap Send UK, Taptap Send
Description:
Taptap Send is a private financial technology company based in London, England, founded in 2015. It offers a mobile money transfer service that simplifies and reduces the cost of sending money internationally, focusing on developing countries in Africa, Asia, and the Caribbean. The company aims to make international remittances cheaper, faster, and more convenient than traditional methods.

By leveraging advanced technology and a network of local banks and mobile money providers, Taptap Send enables secure and rapid mobile-to-mobile money transfers. Its transparent revenue model features small transfer fees that vary by destination, avoiding hidden charges. This approach has helped the company build a loyal user base among individuals sending remittances to underserved markets. Taptap Send is committed to reducing remittance costs to 3%, aligning with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals, and enhancing financial inclusion globally.

Aliases: The Connaught Hotel Limited, The Connaught Hotel
Description:
The Connaught is a prestigious five-star luxury hotel located in Mayfair, London. Established in 1897, it combines British elegance with contemporary design, providing guests with a refined and opulent experience. The hotel features 122 rooms and suites, each designed by acclaimed interior designers, many of which offer private terraces with skyline views. Personalized services, including dedicated butlers, ensure a tailored and comfortable stay.

Dining at The Connaught is exceptional, with Hélène Darroze’s three Michelin-starred restaurant serving exemplary French cuisine. The Connaught Grill highlights British ingredients, while The Connaught Bar, recognized as the World's Best Cocktail Bar, offers expertly crafted cocktails. Additional amenities include a swimming pool, an Asian-inspired spa in partnership with Aman Resorts, a fitness center, and family- and pet-friendly services. The hotel attracts a discerning clientele, including artists and international celebrities, and is ideally situated near premier shopping and dining attractions in London.

The Gap Partnership is a global management consultancy focused on negotiation, founded in 1997 and based in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, UK. The company helps organizations enhance profitability, efficiency, and cost reduction through expert negotiation strategies and training. It has been recognized as a leader in its field, appearing on Forbes' World's Best Management Consulting Firms 2024 list.

The Gap Partnership offers a range of services, including tailored negotiation consulting, comprehensive training programs for individuals and teams, and research on global commercial trends. It also fosters a community through The Negotiation Society, which provides insights from experts and features a podcast on negotiation topics. The company's founder, Steve Gates, is a noted authority in negotiation strategy and has authored *The Negotiation Book*, a respected resource in the industry. With a team of over 200 professionals, The Gap Partnership serves a diverse clientele across various sectors, aiming to optimize negotiation outcomes and improve collaboration.

Xaar plc is a UK-based public company that specializes in the development, manufacture, and supply of industrial inkjet printheads and related technologies. Founded in 1990 in Cambridge, Xaar has evolved from licensing inkjet technology for office printers to becoming a global leader in industrial applications. The company is headquartered at Cambridge Science Park and is listed on the London Stock Exchange.

Xaar designs advanced industrial inkjet printheads, including the Xaar 1001 GS12 and the high-resolution Xaar 5601, which utilizes Thin Film Piezo Silicon MEMS technology. Their printheads are utilized in various sectors such as digital graphics, packaging, labeling, and industrial coding. With a strong focus on research and development, Xaar invests around 11% of its revenue into R&D, resulting in over 2,000 patent applications. The company has grown through strategic acquisitions, enhancing its market position and technological capabilities, and serves a diverse global customer base.

XYZ Reality is a UK-based construction technology company that specializes in engineering-grade augmented reality (AR) solutions. Founded in 2017 by architect David Mitchell, the company focuses on enhancing the planning, building, and delivery of mission-critical construction projects. Their core product, the XYZ Atom™, is the first engineering-grade AR headset that overlays 3D design models onto construction sites with up to 5mm accuracy. This technology allows teams to visualize Building Information Models (BIM) in real time, facilitating immediate decision-making and quality assurance.

In addition to the XYZ Atom™, XYZ Reality offers a construction delivery platform that integrates project data and optimizes workflows. Their solutions are used globally on projects valued at over $12 billion, helping to reduce risks, lower costs, and improve sustainability. The company also provides HoloSite®, a mixed reality solution that combines AR goggles with position-tracking sensors to ensure builds meet exact tolerances. XYZ Reality serves complex build environments, including data centers and pharmaceutical manufacturing facilities, and collaborates with leading developers and contractors to enhance construction workflows.

BFBS (British Forces Broadcasting Service) is a media organization dedicated to serving British armed forces personnel, their families, and veterans around the world. Established in 1943, BFBS aims to keep military communities connected, especially during deployments and postings abroad.

Connected Places Catapult is the UK's innovation accelerator dedicated to enhancing cities, transport, and place leadership. Established in 2019 and based in London, the organization focuses on creating better connected, sustainable, and prosperous environments. Its mission is to connect innovative ideas with markets, addressing challenges like climate change, social isolation, and economic inequality.

Dakota Hotels is a luxury boutique hotel brand based in the UK, known for its stylish design and exceptional service. Founded by Ken McCulloch and owned by Evans Property Group, the brand started with two hotels near Edinburgh Airport and has expanded to five locations, including Central Glasgow, Leeds, Newcastle, and Manchester. Each hotel features designer interiors and premium amenities, creating a comfortable and elegant atmosphere.

Disguise is a global technology leader in media server technology and extended reality (xR) solutions. The company delivers an integrated ecosystem of software, hardware, and creative services to create real-time visual experiences for live events, virtual production, and immersive environments. Disguise powers a significant portion of major live tours and productions for top entertainment brands and venues worldwide.

Forest Research is Great Britain's leading organization for forestry and tree-related research, operating as the research agency of the Forestry Commission. It is recognized for delivering high-quality science, research, and data that promote sustainable forestry practices. As part of the Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs (Defra), Forest Research aims to be a world leader in applied forest science and a trusted provider of expertise and services.

The organization offers a wide range of research and development services, including scientific research to support sustainable forest management, data services utilizing new technologies, and knowledge transfer to aid policy development and innovation in the forestry sector. Forest Research serves various stakeholders, including UK government departments, the Forestry Commission, and international organizations, ensuring compliance with forestry agreements and contributing to environmental strategies. With a focus on collaboration and scientific innovation, Forest Research plays a vital role in advancing sustainable forestry in the UK and beyond.

Home Made is a prop-tech startup based in London, England, founded in 2016. The company focuses on the rental market, offering technology-driven property management and rental listing services. Home Made aims to streamline the renting process for both landlords and tenants.

The company provides curated rental listings that leverage technology to match tenant preferences. It also offers comprehensive property management solutions for landlords, including tenant screening and lease administration. Additionally, Home Made partners with institutional landlords and developers in the build-to-rent sector, providing tailored services for large-scale rental housing projects.

Home Made has raised a total of $3.79 million in funding, with its most recent round securing $2.6 million. The company has been recognized for its innovation in property technology, being included in the Real Estate Tech expert collection.

Jackson Civil Engineering is a UK-based civil engineering contractor with a strong regional presence and national capabilities, operating from seven offices. The company specializes in a wide range of civil engineering projects, including highways, bridges, infrastructure, flood defence, energy, and rail. It also provides Early Contractor Involvement (ECI) services through its division, Jackson Solutions.

The company undertakes various projects such as road and motorway construction, bridge and tunnel building, and water-related works. With dedicated divisions for Highways and Flood Defence, Jackson Civil Engineering ensures expertise in these essential areas. It serves a diverse client base, including the Environment Agency, for whom it manages flood and coastal defence projects, ranging from maintenance to large-scale infrastructure developments. Established in 2007 and headquartered in Ipswich, Suffolk, Jackson Civil Engineering is part of the One Group Construction portfolio, contributing to its success and significant turnover.

JKS Restaurants is a London-based hospitality group founded in November 2008 by siblings Jyotin, Karam, and Sunaina Sethi. The company operates around 30 brands, primarily in Central London, with some locations in the Middle East and plans for expansion into the United States. Their portfolio features Michelin-starred restaurants such as Trishna, Gymkhana, Kitchen Table, Sabor, and Lyle’s, alongside popular casual dining concepts like Hoppers, BAO, Brigadiers, Berenjak, and Bibi. They also own pubs like The Cadogan Arms and The George, and operate several brands within the Arcade Food Hall.

JKS Restaurants is recognized for its commitment to innovation and quality, creating a dynamic environment for its staff. The group emphasizes career development through training programs and offers exclusive benefits. Their diverse clientele includes food enthusiasts seeking high-quality culinary experiences, ranging from fine dining to lively casual eateries. With new locations planned in the United States, including Ambassadors Clubhouse in New York City and Gymkhana in Las Vegas, JKS Restaurants is poised for continued growth and success.

K2 Corporate Mobility is a global mobility relocation and professional services provider based in the United Kingdom. Founded in 2002, the company has grown to employ around 250 people and generates approximately $104.7 million in revenue. With offices in key locations such as Brazil, France, Miami, and the UK, K2 operates through a trusted partner network to deliver services in 186 countries.

The company specializes in customized solutions for global mobility and relocation, offering a wide range of services including short-term mobility, long-term international assignments, permanent transfers, and domestic assignments. K2 acts as an extension of its clients' HR and global mobility teams, providing services like immigration management, relocation management, and policy design. The company emphasizes quality and compliance, maintaining an ISO-accredited partner network to ensure high standards. K2 Corporate Mobility serves multinational corporations, focusing on delivering efficient management of employee mobility programs and fostering long-term partnerships.

One of Us is a visual effects studio with locations in London and Paris, founded in 2004 by Tom Debenham, Dominic Parker, and Rachael Penfold. The studio is recognized for its design-led concept work and serves as a creative partner for directors in the film and television industry.

The company specializes in visual effects services for feature films, episodic content, commercials, and immersive art installations. Their expertise includes bespoke creature design and immersive world-building, collaborating with clients throughout all production stages, from concept development to post-production. One of Us employs around 342 people and supports over 400 artists, fostering a creative environment while managing large-scale projects. In July 2024, Basilic Fly Studio acquired a majority stake in One of Us, enhancing its capabilities and resources.

Aliases: PDP Courier Services Ltd, PDP Courier Services
Description:
CRYOPDP is a global leader in clinical trial logistics and temperature-controlled transport solutions for the life sciences and healthcare sectors, including pharmaceuticals, biotech, and cell & gene therapy. The company operates in 16 countries and supports over 600,000 shipments annually, serving customers and patients in more than 135 countries.

Specializing in white-glove courier services, CRYOPDP ensures the safe and compliant transport of temperature-sensitive materials such as biological samples and investigational drugs. Their logistics solutions encompass packaging, storage, distribution, and real-time monitoring, maintaining strict temperature ranges from cryogenic to ambient conditions. With a team of over 360 logistics professionals, CRYOPDP offers customized end-to-end cold chain logistics and advanced tracking technology to enhance visibility and control throughout the supply chain. The company has received recognition for its excellence, including an award for being the "Most Promising & Valuable Pharma Logistic Company of the Year" in 2021. In 2025, CRYOPDP was acquired by DHL Group to further enhance its capabilities in life sciences and healthcare logistics.

The Principles for Responsible Investment (PRI) is an international network of financial institutions that promotes responsible investment by integrating environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) factors into investment practices. Established in 2006 with the support of the United Nations, PRI aims to foster a sustainable global financial system. It has over 5,000 signatories from more than 80 countries, representing approximately US$128 trillion in assets under management.

PRI provides a framework of six principles to guide investors in embedding ESG issues into their investment analysis and decision-making. These principles encourage active ownership, appropriate ESG disclosure, and collaboration within the investment industry. The organization offers tools, guidance, and resources to help institutional investors, such as pension funds and asset managers, align their practices with global sustainability goals, including net zero emissions and the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). PRI serves as a key platform for investors committed to responsible investment and sustainable financial markets.

Progress Housing Group is a not-for-profit housing provider based in Lancashire, UK. With over 20 years of experience, the organization owns and manages approximately 12,400 homes across England and Scotland, including around 4,200 supported housing units. The Group is committed to delivering high-quality housing and support services that positively impact the lives of its customers and communities.

Headquartered in Preston, Progress Housing Group employs over 500 staff members and is regulated by the Regulator of Social Housing in England. The organization focuses on affordable rent, shared ownership, and supported living properties, catering to individuals with learning disabilities, autism, and mental health conditions. It also offers tenancy management services and community support programs, such as "Key Unlocking Futures," which assists around 10,000 people.

Looking ahead, Progress Housing Group plans to build 800 new homes over the next five years and invests significantly in maintaining and retrofitting existing properties to meet sustainability goals. The Group actively engages with local communities to address housing needs and support vulnerable populations.

Puzzel is a Norway-based company founded in 1998, aiming to be Europe's leading provider of customer experience (CX) solutions. The company offers a comprehensive CX ecosystem that helps businesses deliver exceptional customer service across all touchpoints. Its platform integrates contact center functionalities, self-service options, and AI capabilities, supporting both automated and human-led interactions.

Puzzel focuses on providing a user-friendly CX platform that empowers contact center agents and leaders with tools for automation, insights, and personalized service. The platform leverages AI to automate routine tasks and enhance customer insights, improving efficiency and satisfaction. Recognized for its innovation, Puzzel was awarded the Most Innovative Company in 2023. With an estimated revenue between $50 million and $100 million and a workforce of 201-500 employees, Puzzel serves a diverse range of customers across multiple industries, enhancing their customer interactions and operational efficiency.

Aliases: Raspberry PI Trading Ltd, Raspberry PI Trading
Description:
The Raspberry Pi Foundation is a UK-based educational charity established in 2008. Its mission is to promote the study of computer science and related subjects, particularly among young people. Founded by a group including Eben Upton from the University of Cambridge, the Foundation aims to make computing accessible and affordable, addressing a decline in computer science enrollment.

The Foundation is renowned for its Raspberry Pi series of low-cost, single-board computers, which were first launched in 2012. These credit-card-sized devices are designed to run Linux-based operating systems and are widely used in education, prototyping, and various hobbyist projects. The Foundation also supports a rich software ecosystem and runs educational programs to teach computing skills to young learners worldwide. Through its initiatives, the Raspberry Pi Foundation seeks to inspire interest in programming and digital skills across a diverse user base, including educational institutions, hobbyists, and industry professionals.

Rocket Factory Augsburg (RFA) is a German NewSpace company founded in 2018 and based in Augsburg, Germany. The company focuses on providing fast, affordable, and flexible access to space, primarily for small satellite launches with payload capacities up to 1,300 kg. RFA aims to revolutionize space access by utilizing industrial mass production techniques and components from the automotive industry, targeting a launch cost as low as $3,000 per kilogram to orbit.

RFA's flagship product is the RFA One launch vehicle, a three-stage rocket powered by advanced Helix engines. The company also offers the Redshift Orbital Transfer Vehicle, which enables precise satellite deployment and constellation management. RFA's services are designed for small satellite operators and constellation providers, emphasizing rapid operationalization and high mission flexibility. With a growing team of over 200 employees and strong backing from aerospace leaders, RFA is positioned as a key player in the European space industry, with its first launch planned for Q2 2024.

Spendesk is a financial technology company based in Paris, founded in 2016. It offers an all-in-one spend management platform that simplifies and optimizes spending processes for businesses of all sizes, from startups to established brands. The platform integrates various functions, including corporate cards, invoice payments, expense reimbursements, budgets, approvals, reporting, compliance, and pre-accounting. This comprehensive solution provides full visibility into organizational spending, enabling finance teams to analyze, control, and automate processes effectively.

Spendesk also operates as a regulated payment institution and has expanded its offerings to include strategic procurement capabilities and AI-driven tools for internal efficiency. The company serves over 200,000 business users globally, processing tens of billions of euros in annual spend. With a focus on collaboration, clarity, and trust, Spendesk ensures accountability and maintains high security and compliance standards. Backed by notable investors, Spendesk has achieved unicorn status and profitability, positioning itself as a leader in the European spend management market.

urbanbubble is a residential property management company based in the UK, founded in 2008 and headquartered in Manchester’s Northern Quarter. The company manages over 11,000 residential units across more than 85 communities in major cities like Bath, Birmingham, London, and Leeds. urbanbubble specializes in a range of services, including block and estate management, Private Rented Sector (PRS) lettings, Build to Rent (BtR) management, and Co-Living operations.

The company is dedicated to exceptional customer service, focusing on creating secure and valued living environments for residents. urbanbubble integrates technology and Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles into its operations, supporting sustainability initiatives and energy-efficient solutions. With a team of over 200 employees, urbanbubble has received multiple industry awards, highlighting its innovative and customer-centric approach. Its clientele includes property developers, investors, leaseholders, and residents in the residential real estate sector.

Aliases: World First UK Limited, World First UK
Description:
WorldFirst is a financial technology company founded in 2004 in the UK by Jonathan Quin and Nick Robinson. Headquartered in London, it has developed into a global payments and financial services platform, serving over one million businesses worldwide. The company focuses on simplifying foreign exchange and promoting financial inclusivity for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) engaged in international trade.

WorldFirst specializes in cross-border payments and foreign exchange services, offering a multi-currency World Account that allows businesses to hold, pay, and receive funds in various currencies. This service helps reduce currency conversion costs and risks while facilitating faster international transactions. The platform supports over 90 currencies and enables transfers to more than 200 countries and regions. Additionally, WorldFirst provides hedging solutions, local overseas currency accounts, and integrates with accounting software and major online marketplaces, helping SMEs manage their international sales and payments effectively.

With 32 offices globally, including locations in Australia, Hong Kong, and Japan, WorldFirst is committed to supporting global trade. Since 2019, it has been part of Ant Group, enhancing its capabilities in international business services.

Yondr Group is a global company based in Amsterdam, founded in 2019. It specializes in the development, ownership, and operation of hyperscale data centers. The company provides tailored data center capacity solutions for large technology firms, focusing on cost-effective, custom-built, rack-ready spaces worldwide.

Yondr Group offers a range of services, including integrated project delivery for data center development, operations management to ensure client satisfaction and uptime, and research and development to enhance data center designs with a focus on sustainability. Their procurement approach prioritizes strong relationships with ethical suppliers to maintain an agile supply chain. Yondr's facilities are engineered for efficiency and rapid deployment, supporting the infrastructure needs of major tech enterprises. The company is committed to high health, safety, and welfare standards across its operations, driven by a team of experienced professionals in engineering and procurement.

ZeroAvia is a company focused on developing hydrogen-electric powertrain technology for aviation. Founded in 2018 by Valery Miftakhov, the company aims to enable zero-emission, low-noise flights for regional aircraft. With teams in California, Washington, and the United Kingdom, ZeroAvia has achieved significant milestones, including the world’s first zero-emission flight of a six-seat aircraft in 2019 and successful test flights of a 19-seat hydrogen-electric plane in 2023.

The company is working on hydrogen fuel cell-powered engines that can compete with traditional aircraft engines. ZeroAvia has secured over $100 million in funding from notable investors like Amazon and British Airways. It collaborates with major airlines and aerospace companies, targeting certification of its first powertrain for up to 20-seat planes by the end of 2026, with plans to develop larger powertrains for 30–90 seat aircraft by 2028. The mission is to replace fossil-fuel engines with hydrogen-electric systems, significantly reducing the aviation industry's carbon footprint and noise pollution.

Allies and Morrison is an architecture and urban planning practice founded in 1984 by Bob Allies and Graham Morrison. Headquartered in London, with additional offices in Dublin and New York, the firm has grown into a multidisciplinary team of over 300 professionals, including architects, urbanists, and conservation specialists. The company is recognized for its sensitive design approach, focusing on the retention and restoration of historic structures while delivering sustainable solutions.

Digital Catapult is the UK’s leading innovation agency focused on advanced digital technology. Established in partnership with Innovate UK, its mission is to accelerate the adoption of emerging deep technologies to foster economic growth and societal benefits across the UK. The organization connects startups, scaleups, established businesses, investors, academia, and the public sector, facilitating the transition from research to real-world application of technologies like artificial intelligence, machine learning, 5G, immersive technologies, quantum computing, and the Internet of Things.

Equator is a digital transformation consultancy based in Glasgow, Scotland, with over 25 years of experience. Founded in 1999, it has become Scotland's leading independent digital agency, employing more than 130 digital experts. The company specializes in digital transformation, integrating data, technology, creativity, and marketing to drive sustainable change and real business value.

Equator offers a wide range of services, including business and marketing strategy, brand development, user experience design, and digital product delivery. They focus on creating connected digital experiences that enhance growth and operational efficiency. Notable solutions include EQTR ASSIST, aimed at supporting disruptive start-ups. The company has worked with a diverse clientele, including brands like Virgin Active and AXA, and has received multiple awards for its innovative projects.

With a commitment to collaboration, career growth, and sustainability, Equator fosters a dynamic work environment. The leadership team, consisting of co-founders John, JJ, and Garry, drives the company's vision and strategic direction, ensuring a focus on client success and social responsibility.

Financial Technology Partners (FT Partners) is a boutique investment banking firm based in San Francisco, with additional offices in New York, Miami, and London. Founded over 20 years ago by Steve McLaughlin, the firm specializes exclusively in the financial technology (FinTech) sector, serving founders and CEOs with tailored advisory services. FT Partners has earned recognition in the industry, receiving awards such as "Dealmaker of the Year" and "Investment Banking Firm of the Year" from The M&A Advisor.

The firm offers a comprehensive range of strategic and financial advisory services, including mergers and acquisitions advisory, capital raising, and strategic advisory specifically designed for FinTech companies. With a team of senior bankers who have extensive experience from top Wall Street firms, FT Partners leverages a global network of investors and financial institutions to deliver optimal outcomes for its clients. The firm maintains a focused approach, typically representing a small number of clients at a time to ensure dedicated service and maximize transaction value.

FirstBank UK Limited is a licensed bank in the United Kingdom, originally established as the London branch of First Bank of Nigeria Limited in 1982 and incorporated as a UK subsidiary in 2002. It is part of the First Bank Group, one of Africa’s oldest financial institutions, founded in 1894. The bank serves as a gateway for African banks, companies, and high-net-worth individuals seeking banking services in Europe.

With total assets of approximately £2.46 billion, FirstBank UK Limited ranks as the 83rd largest bank in the UK. It employs around 156 people and reported an annual profit of £36.32 million in 2023. The bank offers a variety of retail and corporate banking products, including savings accounts, deposit accounts, and tailored financial services for corporate clients. It also facilitates banking for African companies and individuals operating in the UK and Europe, leveraging its strong ties to the African market. FirstBank UK Limited is recognized for its solid financial performance and commitment to serving its clients effectively.

Galliard Homes is a prominent British residential property developer based in Loughton, England, founded in 1992. It is recognized as London's largest privately owned residential property developer, employing over 230 staff. The company operates through three main divisions: Galliard Homes, which focuses on residential property sales and marketing; Galliard Commercial, which develops hotels and commercial spaces; and Galliard Construction, which manages construction for various projects.

Galliard Homes specializes in a wide range of residential developments, from affordable apartments to luxury homes, catering to first-time buyers and property investors. The company also engages in mixed-use developments that incorporate commercial elements, creating vibrant communities. With a strong reputation for delivering quality properties, Galliard actively pursues joint ventures and acquisitions to adapt to market demands and enhance its portfolio. Notable projects include The Chilterns in Marylebone and Lincoln Plaza in Docklands, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation and value in the property market.

Gearset is a UK-based company founded in 2015 that provides a comprehensive DevOps platform tailored for Salesforce teams. The company aims to simplify Salesforce deployments, making them more accessible and efficient. With a customer-first approach, Gearset serves over 3,000 customers globally, including well-known enterprises like Disney, IBM, and Zillow.

The platform offers a suite of tools that cover the entire Salesforce DevOps lifecycle. Key features include metadata deployments, CI/CD pipelines, sandbox seeding, automated testing, and backup solutions. Gearset also provides specialized support for complex configurations and monitoring tools to manage errors and changes effectively. The company has expanded its reach with a U.S. office in Chicago, enhancing its service to the American market. Gearset is committed to helping teams deliver better features faster while ensuring reliability and ease of use.

LUC (Land Use Consultants) is an employee-owned environmental services consultancy based in the UK, founded in 1966. The company focuses on addressing complex land use and environmental challenges with a commitment to climate change, biodiversity, and human well-being. LUC emphasizes a collaborative approach, bringing together various professional disciplines to create positive, lasting outcomes for nature, people, and places.

LUC offers a wide range of consultancy services, including planning and landscape planning, strategic ecology, agri-environment guidance, GIS (Geographic Information Systems) services, and natural capital services. Their deliverables include environmental assessments, strategic plans, and community engagement programs tailored to support sustainable land use and conservation efforts. With offices across the UK, LUC serves a diverse clientele, including public sector bodies, private developers, and community groups, all dedicated to environmental stewardship.

Aliases: Ruskin Mill Trust Limited, Ruskin Mill Trust
Description:
Ruskin Mill Trust is a UK-based educational charity established in 1981, focused on providing specialist independent education for children and adults with complex learning needs, including learning disabilities and autism. The Trust operates twelve centres across England, Wales, and Scotland, utilizing a unique educational approach known as Practical Skills Therapeutic Education (PSTE). This method combines practical crafts, land-based activities, and therapeutic processes to help learners overcome barriers and develop essential skills.

The Trust's educational philosophy draws inspiration from figures like Rudolf Steiner and John Ruskin, emphasizing social renewal and the importance of art and crafts within a therapeutic framework. Through its services, Ruskin Mill Trust supports vulnerable children and young people by offering tailored education and training in culturally rich and therapeutic environments. The Trust also manages over 600 acres of biodynamic farmland, woods, and gardens, reflecting its commitment to ecological sustainability and holistic education.

St Andrews Links is a historic golf organization located in St Andrews, Fife, Scotland, known as the "Home of Golf." With a golfing heritage that spans over six centuries, the company manages several renowned golf courses, including the Old Course and Jubilee Course. Established in 1992, St Andrews Links Limited is dedicated to the stewardship and promotion of these iconic courses, which are held in trust for the public.

The organization offers a variety of golf-related services, focusing on golf tourism and course management. It provides golf tour packages that include tee times and accommodations for visitors. St Andrews Links also hosts prestigious tournaments, such as the British Mid-Amateur Golf Championship, enhancing its reputation in the golfing community. The company has recently refreshed its brand to celebrate its rich heritage, reinforcing its identity as a key player in the history of golf.

SkyShowtime is a European streaming service that launched in 2022 as a joint venture between Comcast and Paramount Global, including Skydance Corporation. It offers a premium entertainment platform featuring Hollywood blockbusters, original series, and local content from well-known brands like Universal Pictures, Paramount Pictures, Nickelodeon, and DreamWorks Animation.

The service provides a diverse range of content, including first-run films, scripted series, kids and family programming, and documentaries. Notable titles include Top Gun: Maverick and Jurassic World Dominion. SkyShowtime operates in over 20 European countries, including Spain, Poland, and the Nordic countries, and is accessible through various digital platforms and select TV providers.

SkyShowtime offers multiple subscription plans, including a Premium plan that is ad-free, supports 4K UHD streaming, and allows offline downloads. The service targets European consumers looking for a comprehensive streaming experience that combines popular films with local and original content across a wide range of devices.

Aliases: Solytics Partners UK Limited, Solytics Partners UK
Description:
Solytics Partners is a global financial technology and risk consulting company founded in 2017, with its headquarters in Pune, India, and an office in New York City. The company focuses on providing technology-driven solutions for financial institutions, including banks, insurers, and capital market entities. Their mission is to innovate risk and compliance solutions that help clients manage risk, ensure regulatory compliance, and leverage analytics for improved decision-making.

The company offers a wide range of services, including financial crime and compliance solutions, risk management, regulatory reporting, AI-driven financial forecasting, and ESG analytics. Their advanced platforms utilize technologies such as artificial intelligence, machine learning, and big data analytics to enhance operational efficiency and support clients in navigating complex regulatory landscapes. Solytics Partners is recognized for its leadership in risk management and compliance, consistently ranking in industry lists for innovation and excellence.

Storm Aviation is an international Maintenance, Repair, and Overhaul (MRO) provider based in Norwich, United Kingdom. Established in 1996, the company operates under UK-issued EASA Part-145 and Part-147 approvals, offering a wide range of aviation services for commercial and freight aircraft. Their services include line maintenance, base maintenance, technical training, AOG support, component repair and overhaul, and aircraft interiors maintenance.

As part of FL Technics, Storm Aviation has a global presence with facilities in various countries and a network of line maintenance stations. The company serves over 40 airlines, including major carriers like Lufthansa and Emirates, showcasing its commitment to reliable aviation maintenance. Storm Aviation prioritizes safety, adaptability, and high standards, positioning itself as a trusted partner in the aviation industry.

Striim is a software company based in Palo Alto, California, founded in 2012 by experienced professionals from Oracle GoldenGate. The company focuses on real-time data streaming, integration, and analytics, helping enterprises unify data across various clouds, applications, and databases for informed decision-making.

Striim's main product is an end-to-end streaming integration and intelligence platform that allows continuous data ingestion, processing, and delivery with minimal latency. It supports both structured and unstructured data from a variety of sources, including enterprise databases, log files, and IoT sensors. The platform features advanced Change Data Capture technology for high-speed database replication and real-time analytics. Striim also offers self-managed and fully managed SaaS solutions, processing over 100 billion events daily and serving a wide range of industries.

Tails.com is a UK-based pet food company that specializes in tailored dog nutrition. Founded in 2014 by dog lovers and experts, the company offers 100% customized dog food designed to meet the unique needs of each dog, including factors like age, breed, activity level, health, and flavor preferences. Their core product is a bespoke kibble blend, developed with input from veterinarians and nutritionists, featuring over a million possible ingredient combinations. This personalized dog food is delivered monthly via subscription, ensuring convenience and freshness.

The company operates primarily in the UK and Europe, including countries like France, Germany, and Sweden. Tails.com is backed by Purina, which supports its growth and innovation. Committed to ethical and sustainable practices, Tails.com became a certified B Corporation in 2024. The company emphasizes worker welfare, community engagement, and environmental responsibility, implementing initiatives such as using renewable energy and donating meals to pets in need. Tails.com also focuses on customer support and fosters a dog-friendly workplace culture, enhancing the lives of dogs and their owners.

Aliases: UBIQUE SYSTEMS UK LIMITED, UBIQUE SYSTEMS UK
Description:
Ubique Systems is a global IT recruitment and consulting company founded in 2000 and headquartered in London, UK. The company operates across the UK, USA, Europe, Asia Pacific, and India, providing a wide range of outsourcing and consulting services. These include recruitment, human resource management, vendor management, outplacement services, and software development. Ubique Systems focuses on flexible global business practices to enhance efficiency and deliver value to its clients.

The company is ISO 27001 certified, demonstrating its commitment to information security and quality management. Ubique Systems employs automation and a process-oriented approach to ensure high-quality service delivery and cost savings. Its offerings span traditional and emerging technologies, catering to various industry sectors and technology domains. Ubique Systems emphasizes a partnership approach with clients, aiming to meet their technology and talent acquisition needs effectively.

Unily is a cloud-based Employee Experience Platform (EXP) that enhances communication, collaboration, and productivity for modern, distributed workforces. Founded in 2005 and based in the United Kingdom, Unily integrates with Microsoft cloud technologies like Office 365, SharePoint, and Teams, utilizing Microsoft Azure to create a seamless digital workplace.

The platform is designed to be mobile-first and user-friendly, providing employees with easy access to important updates, schedules, and business tools. Unily focuses on improving organizational alignment and engagement through features such as targeted internal communications, community engagement tools, and advanced knowledge management. It also offers digital workplace tools for tasks like booking meeting rooms and submitting HR requests, all while ensuring strong security measures and a commitment to sustainability. Unily is recognized as a market leader, consistently rated highly by industry analysts and trusted by global brands to enhance employee engagement and streamline operations.

Zenobē is a global leader in battery storage and fleet electrification, dedicated to enhancing the integration of renewable energy. Founded in 2016 and based in London, the company operates a portfolio of battery storage assets with a capacity of approximately 73MW across the UK and is expanding internationally. Zenobē collaborates with grid operators, commercial clients, and utilities to promote clean energy solutions that reduce greenhouse gas emissions and improve air quality.

The company offers a range of services, including large-scale Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) that provide grid stability and frequency balancing. Zenobē is also the largest operator of electric buses in Australia and New Zealand, providing comprehensive fleet electrification solutions. Additionally, they repurpose refurbished batteries for portable power solutions and invest in research and development for EV charging systems. With a strong leadership team and a commitment to innovation, Zenobē is positioned to play a significant role in the transition to sustainable energy and transportation.

Allied Irish Bank (GB) is the UK branch of Allied Irish Banks (AIB), a significant financial services group with operations in both the Republic of Ireland and the United Kingdom. Established in 1966 through the merger of three historic banks, Allied Irish Bank (GB) has been serving businesses in Britain for over 40 years, emphasizing relationship-driven service and organic growth.

allpay Limited is a UK-based payment processing company founded in 1994 by Tony Killeen. Originally named Financial Collection Services, the company has become a leader in electronic payment systems, particularly for the public sector, focusing on bill payment services for social housing and local government. Headquartered in Hereford, England, allpay employs around 300 staff and reported revenues of approximately $56 million in 2024.

aPriori Technologies is an enterprise software company based in Concord, Massachusetts, founded in 2003. The company specializes in advanced manufacturing simulation and cost management solutions tailored for discrete manufacturers in industries such as aerospace, automotive, high-tech, and industrial sectors. Their main product, the aPriori platform, is a digital twin and enterprise cost management software that automates manufacturing insights to optimize product costs, enhance productivity, and reduce carbon footprints.

Avante Care & Support is a not-for-profit charity established in 1990, operating in Kent, Bexley, Greenwich, and Medway in the UK. The organization manages 11 care homes and provides care and support services to over 1,000 older adults. Its core services include residential care, specialist dementia care, respite care, home care, and wellbeing support services, all designed to help individuals maintain their independence.

Bicycle Therapeutics is a biotechnology company focused on developing precision-guided therapeutics for solid tumor cancers. Founded in 2009, the company has created a unique therapeutic modality using proprietary molecules known as Bicycles®. These small, cyclized peptides are designed to bind target proteins with high affinity and selectivity, allowing for rapid tumor penetration while minimizing exposure to healthy tissues.

Bud Financial is a data intelligence platform established in 2015, specializing in financial services. The company transforms raw transaction data into actionable insights for banks and financial institutions, utilizing AI and machine learning to enhance customer experiences.

CPCS is a global management consulting firm based in Ottawa, Canada, specializing in infrastructure development, particularly in the transportation and power sectors. Founded in 1996, the firm has completed nearly 1,700 projects across over 120 countries. CPCS focuses on private sector participation in infrastructure, providing expertise in operations, investment, policy, regulation, and governance.

Damira Dental Studios is a UK-based dental group founded in 2003. It has expanded from a single practice in Oxford to a network of 35 to 42 practices across regions such as Berkshire, London, and Surrey. The company provides both NHS and private dental care, emphasizing clinical excellence and patient-centered service.

DGA Group is a global advisory firm founded in 2021 that specializes in helping clients protect and grow their assets by navigating complex policy, reputational, and financial challenges. The firm combines advanced technology with expertise in policy analysis, communications, and business intelligence to provide actionable insights and measurable results.

Faria Education Group is a global leader in international education systems, serving over 10,000 schools and 4 million students in 155 countries. Founded in 2006, the company offers integrated, technology-driven solutions that enhance curriculum management, teaching and learning, admissions, and school-to-home communication.

Their flagship product, ManageBac, supports curriculum planning and assessment, particularly for International Baccalaureate (IB) World Schools. Faria provides tools for lesson planning, student assessment, and streamlined admissions processes. They also focus on professional development for educators and offer online courses in partnership with institutions like Wolsey Hall for Schools.

Faria Education Group is committed to innovation and customer success, fostering a culture that emphasizes collaboration and operational excellence. Their solutions are trusted by a diverse range of international schools, reflecting their broad global impact in the education sector.

Victor is a super premium pet food brand produced by Mid America Pet Food, a family-owned company based in Mount Pleasant, Texas. Founded in 2007, Victor focuses on manufacturing high-quality dog and cat food that emphasizes nutrition, digestive health, and strong immunity. With over 70 years of combined experience in the pet food industry, Victor is recognized for its nutrient-rich formulas offered at a common-sense value.

The product lineup includes various dry kibble options, grain-free formulas, and specialized diets tailored to different life stages and dietary needs of pets. Victor serves a diverse customer base, including outdoor enthusiasts, trainers, breeders, and pet owners who seek reliable nutrition for their animals. The company operates a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in East Texas, where significant investments have been made to enhance production capabilities and food safety protocols. Victor's distribution network includes partnerships with major online retailers and independent pet stores across the United States, supporting its goal of being a leading independently owned pet food brand.

Fortius Clinic is the largest private orthopaedic treatment center in London, focusing on orthopaedic surgery, sports medicine, and sports injury care. The clinic provides expert diagnosis, treatment, and rehabilitation for a variety of musculoskeletal and sports-related conditions. 

Services include robotic-assisted joint replacement surgery, individualized treatment programs for athletes, and specialized care for rheumatology and podiatry. The clinic also features a dedicated spine care team with fellowship-trained specialists, advanced diagnostic technologies, and a range of additional services like a tendon clinic and rapid access for winter sports injuries. 

With over 200 specialists, Fortius Clinic treats thousands of patients each year, offering transparent pricing and flexible payment options. The clinic is committed to delivering world-class care, utilizing the latest technology and a multidisciplinary approach to help patients recover and return to their activities with improved function.

JERA Global Markets (JERAGM) is a prominent energy trading company specializing in liquefied natural gas (LNG), coal, power, and freight. Headquartered in London, with significant operations in Singapore, JERAGM operates a comprehensive trading platform across key global markets, including North America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and Asia. The company is a joint venture primarily owned by JERA Co., Inc. and EDF Trading, focusing on large-scale renewable energy and achieving zero CO2 emissions by 2050.

With a team of around 300 professionals, JERAGM engages in fuel trading, electricity and gas sales, and coal and LNG import optimization. The company manages freight logistics for energy deliveries and incorporates risk management and IT functions to support its trading activities. JERAGM serves a diverse range of customers, including utility companies and industrial consumers, enhancing energy security and supply stability globally. The company is committed to high regulatory standards and sustainable energy trading practices.

TXP (Technology x People) is a UK-based digital transformation company that specializes in consulting, development, and technology resourcing solutions. The company serves a diverse range of blue-chip clients in both public and private sectors. TXP focuses on helping organizations modernize and address complex business challenges by integrating technology with human expertise.

The company offers a variety of services aimed at optimizing technology infrastructure. These include legacy modernization, cloud solutions, mainframe modernization, data analytics and AI, product development, managed operations, and cyber security. TXP also has a talent division, TXP Talent, which focuses on tech recruitment and career opportunities across sectors like IT, engineering, logistics, and retail. This division enhances TXP's mission to combine technology and people by sourcing expert talent for its clients.

Overall, TXP positions itself as a partner that enables businesses to innovate and thrive in a rapidly changing technological landscape.

Kline + Company is a global market research and advisory firm founded in 1959 by Dr. Charles Kline. Initially focused on the specialty chemicals industry, the company has expanded its expertise to include sectors such as lubricants, petroleum specialties, and professional beauty. With ten offices worldwide, Kline + Company is known for its rigorous research methodologies and deep industry knowledge.

The firm offers a range of services, including market research, competitor and market intelligence, company trackers, trend analysis, predictive analytics, and strategic advisory services. Their customized research reports and interactive consulting engagements help clients make informed decisions and anticipate market changes. Kline + Company serves a prestigious client base, including industry leaders like ExxonMobil, Shell, Bayer, BASF, Wella, and L’Oréal, providing insights that enable them to navigate complex markets and drive innovation.

Logpoint is a multinational cybersecurity company based in Copenhagen, Denmark, founded in 2008 by Søren Laustrup. Initially focused on log management and analysis, it has evolved into a leading provider of Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) solutions. The company offers a comprehensive cybersecurity operations platform that includes advanced analytics, machine learning, User and Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA), Security Orchestration, Automation and Response (SOAR), and Extended Detection and Response (XDR).

Logpoint's platform is designed to empower security teams by efficiently detecting threats, minimizing false positives, and autonomously prioritizing risks. It integrates sophisticated machine learning with automation to enhance threat detection and response, supporting the protection of critical applications like SAP. With a diverse customer base across industries such as financial services, healthcare, and government, Logpoint has established a global presence with offices in Europe, North America, and Asia. The company emphasizes a culture of innovation and client satisfaction, backed by an industry-leading support team.

Ministry of Sound is a British multimedia entertainment brand that began as a nightclub in London in 1991. Founded by James Palumbo, Humphrey Waterhouse, and DJ Justin Berkmann, the venue is renowned for its exceptional sound quality, featuring a custom-built sound system. Located in a converted bus garage in Elephant & Castle, the club has become an iconic destination for dance music events and cultural happenings.

The brand has expanded significantly beyond its nightclub origins. It operates a successful record label, known for releasing numerous dance music compilations and singles, achieving over 70 million album sales worldwide. Ministry of Sound also runs a radio station with over 1 million monthly listeners, organizes more than 1,000 global club nights each year, and offers a range of branded merchandise and audio products, including headphones and wireless speakers. With a diverse audience that includes electronic dance music fans and fitness event attendees, Ministry of Sound continues to be a major player in the entertainment and music industries.

Opensignal is a global leader in mobile network analytics, founded in 2010 and headquartered in London, UK. The company specializes in measuring the real-world mobile network experience through crowdsourced data from billions of on-device measurements. This approach provides an accurate view of network performance, focusing on metrics such as 4G/5G availability, download speeds, and video streaming quality.

Opensignal's mission is to enhance the telecommunications industry by offering customer-centric insights that help telecom operators, regulators, and analysts make informed decisions. The company provides various services, including the Global Network Excellence Index, market performance insights, and cloud-based analytics solutions. Opensignal serves a diverse clientele, including major telecom operators and industry analysts in over 60 countries, and is recognized for its independent reports on mobile network performance.

Orchard Hill College & Academy Trust (OHC&AT) is a specialist education provider and academy trust based in Sutton, Surrey, UK. Established in 2013, it serves a diverse population of pupils and students with special educational needs and disabilities (SEND) from nursery age through further education across London, Surrey, Sussex, and Berkshire. The Trust sponsors 14 special education needs schools and academies and operates seven college centres, offering tailored educational services to meet the unique needs of young people.

OHC&AT's mission is to enhance opportunities and outcomes for students with various learning challenges, including autism, speech and communication difficulties, and physical disabilities. The Trust focuses on empowering students to build confidence and life skills, ensuring they have meaningful experiences that support their transition into adulthood. In addition to providing specialist education, OHC&AT engages in training and research, advocates for students, and collaborates with local authorities to deliver inclusive education and support services.

Pinewood Group Limited is a British multinational media company based in Iver Heath, Buckinghamshire.
